mapper.insert:
insert into student_answer(student_paper_id,student_id, question_id, student_answer, correct_answer, score, is_correct) values
(#{item.studentPaperId},#{item.studentId},#{item.questionId},#{item.studentAnswer},#{item.correctAnswer},#{item.score},#{item.isCorrect})
mapper.select: select student_paper_id,student_id,SUM(score) as count_score from student_answer where student_id = #{studentId} and student_paper_id = #{studentPaperId}

SELECT sa.question_id,q.type,q.content, q.option_a, SUM(jt.student_answer = 'A') AS totalA, q.option_b, SUM(jt.student_answer = 'B') AS totalB, q.option_c, SUM(jt.student_answer = 'C') AS totalC, q.option_d, SUM(jt.student_answer = 'D') AS totalD, q.correct_answer, SUM(jt.student_answer = '1') AS totalTrue, SUM(jt.student_answer = '0') AS totalFalse FROM student_answer sa LEFT JOIN question q ON q.id = sa.question_id JOIN JSON_TABLE(CONCAT('["', REPLACE(sa.student_answer, ',', '","'), '"]'), '$[*]' COLUMNS(student_answer VARCHAR(10) PATH '$')) jt WHERE sa.student_paper_id = #{paperId} GROUP BY sa.question_id, q.content ORDER BY sa.question_id
mapper.delete: delete from student_answer where student_id=#{studentId} and student_paper_id=#{studentPaperId}
